creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Version 2.17.1 has been released.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	devel_guiloader.diff
#	devel_guiloader-c++.diff
#	devel_crow.diff
#
echo x - devel_guiloader.diff
sed 's/^X//' >devel_guiloader.diff << 'af32ea64f1d97200c54713b324e236a6'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/guiloader/Makefile devel/guiloader/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/devel/guiloader/Makefile	2010-05-31 16:16:38.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/guiloader/Makefile	2010-06-01 05:08:25.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	guiloader
X-PORTVERSION=	2.15.0
X-PORTREVISION=	4
X+PORTVERSION=	2.17.1
X CATEGORIES=	devel gnome
X-MASTER_SITES=	SF/crow-designer/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
X+MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
X+PROJECTHOST=	nothing-personal
X 
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	A high-performance and compact GuiXml loader library
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/guiloader/distinfo devel/guiloader/distinfo
X--- /usr/ports/devel/guiloader/distinfo	2009-06-18 23:09:20.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/guiloader/distinfo	2010-06-01 05:13:07.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
X-MD5 (guiloader-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 96e46395ab09e47cce1cfef317021d1d
X-SHA256 (guiloader-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 0d919624cd057871720890a8755194a192c21c00fa7afc6fab008c08b491a17a
X-SIZE (guiloader-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 287566
X+MD5 (guiloader-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = c7639ae120c5a2c20885054f8abb53b3
X+SHA256 (guiloader-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = ffb91e9fd16155136c9cee5da6e0b24654a90762e55b933a5aae90e6333c0eb9
X+SIZE (guiloader-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = 291658
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/guiloader/pkg-descr devel/guiloader/pkg-descr
X--- /usr/ports/devel/guiloader/pkg-descr	2008-04-04 23:41:15.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/guiloader/pkg-descr	2010-06-01 05:06:29.000000000 +0900
X@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@
X a trivial language-independent API. GuiLoader was designed to be
X easily wrapped for any language that has GTK+ bindings.
X 
X-WWW: http://crow-designer.sourceforge.net/
X+WWW: http://www.crowdesigner.org/
af32ea64f1d97200c54713b324e236a6
echo x - devel_guiloader-c++.diff
sed 's/^X//' >devel_guiloader-c++.diff << 'e655b0a2132cb27923154a9ecd8ed41e'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/guiloader-c++/Makefile devel/guiloader-c++/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/devel/guiloader-c++/Makefile	2010-05-31 16:16:38.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/guiloader-c++/Makefile	2010-06-01 05:08:40.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	guiloader-c++
X-PORTVERSION=	2.15.0
X-PORTREVISION=	4
X+PORTVERSION=	2.17.1
X CATEGORIES=	devel gnome
X-MASTER_SITES=	SF/crow-designer/guiloader-c%2B%2B/${PORTVERSION}
X+MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
X+PROJECTHOST=	nothing-personal
X 
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	A C++ binding to the GuiLoader library
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/guiloader-c++/distinfo devel/guiloader-c++/distinfo
X--- /usr/ports/devel/guiloader-c++/distinfo	2009-06-18 23:09:21.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/guiloader-c++/distinfo	2010-06-01 05:13:12.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
X-MD5 (guiloader-c++-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 925454f0f7952afecfb322a5087ffb40
X-SHA256 (guiloader-c++-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = cda55404fc76a797f710fa5bf52b9151b5ce5c490a274674b4a3aa4dbbe94cb0
X-SIZE (guiloader-c++-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 295897
X+MD5 (guiloader-c++-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = 9b02ea012929f44ee7692e4229180d2c
X+SHA256 (guiloader-c++-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = b223f5ee030584c0bda26444f66bcfd688c3fcd83bb65399e35aa97a9caaeae2
X+SIZE (guiloader-c++-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = 300212
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/guiloader-c++/pkg-descr devel/guiloader-c++/pkg-descr
X--- /usr/ports/devel/guiloader-c++/pkg-descr	2008-04-04 23:41:16.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/guiloader-c++/pkg-descr	2010-06-01 05:06:39.000000000 +0900
X@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@
X in the C++ language by introducing exception safety, binding GTK+ objects
X defined in GuiXml to C++ variables and type-safe dynamic connection to signals.
X 
X-WWW: http://crow-designer.sourceforge.net/
X+WWW: http://www.crowdesigner.org/
e655b0a2132cb27923154a9ecd8ed41e
echo x - devel_crow.diff
sed 's/^X//' >devel_crow.diff << 'e161a20619f27e34cdb2e6a782c4ce98'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/crow/Makefile devel/crow/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/devel/crow/Makefile	2010-05-31 16:16:23.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/crow/Makefile	2010-06-01 05:07:54.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	crow
X-PORTVERSION=	2.15.0
X-PORTREVISION=	4
X+PORTVERSION=	2.17.1
X CATEGORIES=	devel gnome
X-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}-designer/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
X+MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
X+PROJECTHOST=	nothing-personal
X 
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	A modern GUI builder for the GTK+ toolkit
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/crow/distinfo devel/crow/distinfo
X--- /usr/ports/devel/crow/distinfo	2009-06-18 23:09:08.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/crow/distinfo	2010-06-01 05:13:17.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
X-MD5 (crow-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 669b01f9508a234d03177d3a58205706
X-SHA256 (crow-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 3af6c54481ba94686be0e331e5427f861e2500e191139de350764ac0646055e9
X-SIZE (crow-2.15.0.tar.bz2) = 393014
X+MD5 (crow-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = f85b53806bd6abb6ac30ea8018dab010
X+SHA256 (crow-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = dd4cd9d5cb13159d61cf6568ef5e38334a063c8c72d775f667c64dfcb4a5770a
X+SIZE (crow-2.17.1.tar.bz2) = 453553
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/crow/pkg-descr devel/crow/pkg-descr
X--- /usr/ports/devel/crow/pkg-descr	2007-05-28 06:50:37.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/crow/pkg-descr	2010-06-01 05:06:17.000000000 +0900
X@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@
X is coherent and productive for experienced GTK+ users as well as simple
X and accessible for newcomers.
X 
X-WWW: http://crow-designer.sourceforge.net/
X+WWW: http://www.crowdesigner.org/
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/crow/pkg-plist devel/crow/pkg-plist
X--- /usr/ports/devel/crow/pkg-plist	2009-06-18 23:09:08.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/crow/pkg-plist	2010-05-18 00:53:33.000000000 +0900
X@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
X lib/libcrow.la
X lib/libcrow.so
X share/applications/crow.desktop
X+share/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/crow.mo
X share/mime/packages/crow.xml
X share/pixmaps/crow.png
X @dirrmtry share/mime/packages
e161a20619f27e34cdb2e6a782c4ce98
exit
